title: Process Engineer Vacancy at TVS Motor - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at TVS Motor - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
TVS Motor is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About TVS Motor:
TVS Motor is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Motor!
